scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.start: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,magenta "npm run start:api" "npm run start:web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.render-build:api: npm install --include=dev && (npm run prisma:generate --workspace api || true) && npm run build:api
